name: python3-portend
title: python3-portend
summary: Python module to monitor TCP port states
description:
Python module to monitor TCP port states
Portend is a module to monitor TCP ports for bound or unbound states.
It provides routines to wait for a port to become free or occuopied,
check the current state of a port, or identify a suitable port
available for binding locally.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-portend because Python module to monitor TCP port states.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-portend as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-portend with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-portend --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
